Paragraph.Sentence: Which of the following is not a geometric sequence?

response.feedback: You're right! You've correctly selected the sequence that is not geometric.
From among a set of options, the student was able to select the non-geometric sequence. The student was able to do this even though some of the sequences contain fractions and negative terms.
Sorry, that's not right. The sequence ... is geometric. Since each term is equal to negative one-half times the previous term, this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of -1/2.

The student was not able to select a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options. Some of these sequences include fractions and negative terms; this may or may not be the source of the difficulty.
Sorry, that's not right. The sequence ... is geometric. Since each term is equal to one-half times the previous term, this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of 1/2.

The student was not able to select a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options. Some of these sequences include fractions and negative terms; this may or may not be the source of the difficulty.
Sorry, that's not right. The sequence ... is geometric. Since each term is equal to one-half times the previous term, this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of 1/2.

The student was not able to select a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options. Some of these sequences include fractions and negative terms; this may or may not be the source of the difficulty.
